projectDescription: A 100% self-contained, offline-first AI agent workspace that bundles the Odysseus web UI and a hardware-optimized llama.cpp inference engine, running portably from any directory or USB drive without requiring pre-installed system dependencies.
keyFeatures: Zero system dependencies — all runtimes (Node.js 22, Python 3.12, llama-server) downloaded and cached portably
Hardware-aware inference: automatic GPU detection (CUDA, Vulkan, Metal, CPU) with matching llama.cpp binary selection
Dual inference backends: llama.cpp (GGUF router with auto context scaling) and Ollama
Auto context window sizing based on available VRAM/RAM and loaded model size
Self-healing code patches applied on every launch to keep the Odysseus web UI compatible with portable mode
Data portability guarantee: all user data, models, and configs stay inside the project folder
Automatic Odysseus source cloning and git pull on every startup
Port conflict detection with automatic fallback to next free port
Cross-platform support: Windows, macOS (Intel & Apple Silicon), Linux (x64 & ARM64)
USB/exFAT drive compatibility with symlink-to-hardlink fallback
publicApiSurface: start.bat — Windows entry point
start.sh — macOS/Linux entry point
node src/start.js --backend=llama|ollama — programmatic backend selection
ODYSSEUS_BACKEND env var — select llama or ollama backend
ODYSSEUS_PORT env var — override web UI port (default 7070)
ODYSSEUS_PROXY_PORT env var — override API proxy port (default 8080)
ODYSSEUS_LLAMA_PORT env var — override llama-server port (default 10086)
ODYSSEUS_LLAMA_CTX env var — force specific llama.cpp context window size
ODYSSEUS_LLAMA_PARALLEL env var — set parallel inference slots (default 1)
ODYSSEUS_ADMIN_USER env var — custom admin username (default: admin)
ODYSSEUS_ADMIN_PASSWORD env var — custom admin password (default: techjarves)
data/launcher_config.json — persistent launcher settings file
models/ — directory for GGUF model files
src/system.js detectHardware() — OS/CPU/GPU/RAM scanner
src/downloader.js downloadFile(), extractArchive(), getLlamaCppAssets() — download utilities
src/backends/llama/index.js startLlamaBackend() — llama.cpp backend launcher
src/backends/ollama/index.js startOllamaBackend() — Ollama backend launcher
src/backends/common.js seedPortableEndpoint() — SQLite endpoint seeder
src/bootstrap/git.js ensureOdysseusSource() — Odysseus repo bootstrapper
src/runtime.js createRuntimeTracker() — subprocess lifecycle manager
